response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and embedded systems, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which matches the AI agent development requirement uncommonly well. Strong track record with React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and a clear software craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Direct, current experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React background with relational and NoSQL databases
Polyglot engineer (TS, Java, D, C/C++, PHP, Swift) with strong craftsmanship and testing focus
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not called out explicitly (Java present, but secondary-stack alignment is partial)
Location listed as Bangalore while the team appears Berlin-based — timezone/relocation alignment unclear
